non_blocking_risks.risk: If the reusable method slice changes after plugin-drafts.json is stabilized, plugin-interfaces.json and plugin-upgrade-rules.json may need coordinated refresh.

profile_adherence.evidence: The run stayed autonomous and deep, promoted stable reusable structure into plugin drafts proactively, and still kept pluginization downstream of evaluation.

same_source_consistency.evidence: The plugin decisions, plugin drafts, skill-facing interfaces, and feedback writebacks all refer to the same stabilized reusable method slice.

cross_format_consistency.evidence: The JSON plugin artifacts and the XML evaluation report agree on plugin maturity, interface dependency, and writeback direction.

fact_validation_chain.item: Confirm plugin-decisions.json says what is promoted now, what stays deferred, and why.
Confirm plugin-drafts.json preserves plugin_name, plugin_level, domain_scope, evidence_sources, operator_map, failure_modes, and upgrade_rule.
Confirm plugin-interfaces.json stays downstream of plugin-drafts.json and does not redefine plugin semantics independently.
Confirm plugin-feedbacks.json records vocabulary, analysis, solution, and failure writebacks separately.
Confirm plugin-upgrade-rules.json makes P0 to P1 to P2 promotion explicit rather than silently upgrading maturity.

unverifiable_assumptions.item: The same reusable structure will recur in enough later rounds to justify promotion beyond the current plugin level.

check.note: plugin decisions, drafts, interfaces, feedback writebacks, and upgrade rules are all present and remain downstream of stable evaluation outputs.

scope_alignment_checks.item: The round keeps pluginization and skill exteriorization inside the source-aligned core and does not widen into runtime operations or treat MCP skills as plugin identity.

check.note: plugin-decisions.json and plugin-drafts.json were produced only after evaluation stabilized the reusable slice worth exteriorizing.
plugin-interfaces.json, plugin-feedbacks.json, and plugin-upgrade-rules.json carry the pluginized result into future-round reuse without redefining the upstream slice.

dispatch_recommendations.item: Proceed because pluginization remains downstream of evaluation, MCP skill identity stays separate from plugin structure, and future upgrade logic is explicit.

check.note: The autonomous deep profile justified a bounded pluginization probe once reusable structure had stabilized, and the probe did not drift into runtime operations engineering.

check.why: Without it, pluginization would collapse into an untracked intuition about reuse rather than an explicit promotion decision.
check.evidence: plugin-drafts.json and plugin-upgrade-rules.json both depend on the decision surface it records.

check.why: It is the pivot artifact between current-round reusable structure and later skill-facing exteriorization.
check.evidence: plugin-interfaces.json, plugin-feedbacks.json, and plugin-upgrade-rules.json all depend on it.

profile_adjustment_recommendation.adjustment_reason: The current profile fit the round because pluginization benefited from proactive crystallization after the reusable slice became stable enough.

evaluation_report.score_reason: The example closes the pluginization gap in the standard set, although later real tasks may still reveal richer plugin feedback and upgrade topologies.
